Honestly, this felt more of man throwing a tantrum that he is 'in love' than struggling at the one-sided love ahhaha. But that is just how I see Subspace— considering it pretty much confirm that bro was raised nothing but an expendable for Blackrock eithout realizing it, I can see him just so dumbfounded on catching feelings.

Again, sorry if it is bad- I ain't too good at making up scenarios <:3
